song.title: The Music of Love
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) There is music in my heart, A song for Him I love; There’s a hymn upon my lips, Of tender grace.|| All my love’s poured out on Him, Loving until I am restored; Loving Jesus till My heart is soothed and new.
[V2] 2) Though I’m weak and often fail, My love for Him is strong; Yet I often seek elsewhere for happiness. Still His love it draws me close,|| Though I am fragile and so cold; He will ever, always, Hold me in His love.
[V3] 3) Though I think I am so strong, Yet truly I am weak; When temptations come my way, I am undone;|| Still my Lord, He loves me so, Even as I am full of shame; Oh, He loves me, and He loves eternally.
[V4] 4) Disappointed oft am I, Yet still I trust Him more; When my spirit is so weak, I groan and sigh;|| Then my Love refreshes me, And He whispers softly saying: “I love you and I will never let you go.”
[V5] 5) There is music in my heart, A song for Him I love; There’s a hymn upon my lips, Of tender grace;|| I will testify of Him, Loving Him till I am restored, Loving Jesus till my heart is soothed and new.
song.author: Titus Chu
